name: Auxiliary Boosters
oracle_text:
When this Equipment enters, create a 2/2 colorless Robot artifact creature token and attach this Equipment to it.
Equipped creature gets +1/+2 and has flying.

name: Banishing Light
oracle_text: When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.
flavor_text: "Stygian demon! You are sentenced to ten cycles of illumination. May the light scour the shadow from your soul."

name: Beamsaw Prospector
oracle_text: When this creature dies, create a Lander token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.")
flavor_text: The Kav had learned their lesson about mining too deep. Zern Miffles had not.

name: Biosynthic Burst
oracle_text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains reach, trample, and indestructible until end of turn. Untap it. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.)
flavor_text:
Maybe in your next evolution.
—Eumidian insult

name: Blooming Stinger
oracle_text:
Deathtouch
When this creature enters, another target creature you control gains deathtouch until end of turn.
flavor_text: Death never smelled so sweet.

name: Bombard
oracle_text: Bombard deals 4 damage to target creature.
flavor_text:
"Go back to your little war, sun-stooge! This here is *our* operation!"
—Kunthaar, Kav mine operator

name: Brightspear Zealot
oracle_text:
Vigilance
This creature gets +2/+0 as long as you've cast two or more spells this turn.

name: Chrome Companion
oracle_text:
Whenever this creature becomes tapped, you gain 1 life.
{2}, {T}: Put target card from a graveyard on the bottom of its owner's library.

oracle_text:
Flying

oracle_text:
Lifelink
Whenever this creature attacks, you may sacrifice another creature or artifact. If you do, this creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

name: Command Bridge
oracle_text:

{T}: Add one mana of any color.

Enchant creature

oracle_text:
You draw two cards and lose 2 life.
Void — If a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn, instead you draw two cards and each opponent loses 2 life.

name: Depressurize
oracle_text: Target creature gets -3/-0 until end of turn. Then if that creature's power is 0 or less, destroy it.
flavor_text: The Sunstar faith teaches of Perfect Void—of emptying oneself so that the light may fill the hollow. But in the void of death, its teachings bring little comfort.

name: Diplomatic Relations
oracle_text: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains vigilance until end of turn. It deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls.
flavor_text:
"We will not yield until the Eumidians relinquish our Kavaron Tomorrow."
